reads_completed.summary: AWSP v1.3.0 standard, conversation isolation rules, no fabricated binding metadata.
Scaffold currently generates conversation binding and registry schema; current state still defaults binding to active.
Standalone validator currently performs Draft7 validation but against entry-level schema and requires at least one active binding.
Run-id consistency validator checks prompt template variables, manifest run_id, pack filename, and GPT reply run_id.
Current tests include R3 schema closure cases but still encode at-least-one-active policy.
Cross-project scaffold tests cover AWSP scaffold, .agent governance files, and conversation registry scaffold validation.
Startup read gate validates read proof presence, hashes, coverage, and P0 reads.
Pre-GPT gate lints evidence packs and can integrate startup read gate checks.
State machine runtime guards task state transitions.
Human decision record utility creates and validates human-required transition evidence.
